content: Send notification about space restoring to users

comment.text: This translation key is used to display a notification message about restoring space to users. It appears on a checkbox label in a UI element where users can choose to send notifications upon restoring their space. The translated text should be concise and clear for users.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation omits the core subject of the notification: 'space restoring'. The current Finnish text translates to 'Send notification to site users', losing the context of what the notification is about.
The Armenian translation uses 'կայքէջի' (website) instead of 'space' (կայք/տարածք/սփեյս). In the context of ONLYOFFICE DocSpace, 'space' refers to a workspace/space, not a website.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Ուղարկեք օգտատերերին տարածքի վերականգնման մասին ծանուցում

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'space' (referring to a digital workspace/area) is translated as 'ປະຕູ' (door), which is incorrect in this context.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ສົ່ງການແຈ້ງເຕືອນກ່ຽວກັບການຟື້ນຟູສະເປດໃຫ້ກັບຜູ້ໃຊ້

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Latvian translation uses 'portāla' (portal) instead of 'telpas' (space). In the context of ONLYOFFICE DocSpace, 'space' refers to a specific workspace/space, not a web portal.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Nosūtīt lietotājiem paziņojumu par telpas atjaunošanu

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Polish translation changes the meaning from 'restoring the space' to 'restoring users to the portal'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Wyślij powiadomienie o przywracaniu przestrzeni użytkownikom

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Russian translation uses the word 'портала' (portal) instead of 'пространства' (space). In the context of ONLYOFFICE DocSpace, 'space' is a specific entity, and 'portal' is a different concept.

The word 'පරිශ්‍රීලකයින්ට' (parishrilakayinta) is a misspelling/incorrect word for 'පරිශීලකයින්ට' (parishilakayinta - users). Additionally, 'ප්‍රත්‍යර්පණය' (prathyarpanaya) is a highly formal/technical term for 'restoration' that might be confusing, but the primary critical error is the misspelling of 'users'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: අවකාශය යථා තත්ත්වයට පත් කිරීම පිළිබඳව පරිශීලකයින් දැනුවත් කරන්න

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Ukrainian translation uses 'порталу' (portal) instead of 'простору' (space). In the context of ONLYOFFICE DocSpace, 'space' and 'portal' are different entities.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Надсилати користувачам повідомлення про відновлення простору
